batches.title: Human-reviewed content/help/policy English translation batch
batches.scope: brand, careers, charter, foundation, policies, support authority decision, and content/help policy parity gates

batches.title: Human-reviewed article counterpart translation batch
batches.scope: six deferred ZH editorial article counterparts plus cover alt/claim review
dependency_assumptions: Content page batch does not expose draft URLs

batches.title: Topic and test landing authority translation/readiness batch
batches.scope: RIASEC/IQ/EQ/clinical/career/personality topic gaps, FAQ/CTA/schema grounding, and test landing parity review
dependency_assumptions: Scale registry bilingual contracts remain source authority

batches.title: Research report translation and claim-boundary review package
batches.scope: MBTI salary/turnover report candidate, methodology/sample/references/author/reviewer, Dataset schema decision
dependency_assumptions: Research report remains draft/unpublished until explicit publish approval

batches.title: Career guides/jobs translation group and import-readiness batch
batches.scope: 36 guide-code pairs, 342 zh job rows, 36 en generic jobs, explicit job_code translation group design
dependency_assumptions: No career job detail URLs enter sitemap/llms until authority/runtime 200 proven

batches.title: Result/report English asset translation and no-zh-fallback batch
dependency_assumptions: No EN result/report fallback to zh-CN interpretation copy

batches.title: Media alt/OG visual OCR and locale variant batch
batches.scope: shared article covers, career guide social images, MBTI share visual, alt/caption/embedded Chinese review
dependency_assumptions: Human/OCR visual review completed before claiming parity

batches.title: Global UI i18n parity review and frontend consumer follow-up
batches.scope: header/nav/footer/language switch/buttons/forms/paywall/checkout/My Results/email capture UI labels
files_likely_touched: fap-web i18n/nav/footer files in a future fap-web PR
backend docs generated linkage if needed
dependency_assumptions: Backend content page authority exists for footer/nav company/legal destinations
